title: Pipedream App Structure
description: Structural summary of Pipedream App as exposed by the Pipedream API.

id.description: ID of the app. Only applies for OAuth apps.

name_slug.description: The name slug of the target app (see https://pipedream.com/docs/connect/quickstart#find-your-apps-name-slug)

name.description: The human-readable name of the app

description.description: A short description of the app

img_src.description: The URL to the app's logo

custom_fields_json.description: A JSON string representing the custom fields for the app

featured_weight.description: A rough directional ordering of app popularity, subject to changes by Pipedream
